title: Develop an integrated pest management program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop an integrated pest management program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine IPM strategy

pcs.text: Identify weed, pest and disease infestations, considering workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify weed, pest and disease infestations, considering workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify weed, pest and disease infestations, considering workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Define weed, pest and disease relationships and vectors as key factors in developing the integrated pest management (IPM) program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define weed, pest and disease relationships and vectors as key factors in developing the integrated pest management (IPM) program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define weed, pest and disease relationships and vectors as key factors in developing the integrated pest management (IPM) program.

pcs.text: Develop a system to assess the size and extent of any infestation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a system to assess the size and extent of any infestation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a system to assess the size and extent of any infestation.

pcs.text: Assess business implications and urgency of action according to published data, workplace procedures and economic threshold
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess business implications and urgency of action according to published data, workplace procedures and economic threshold?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess business implications and urgency of action according to published data, workplace procedures and economic threshold.

pcs.text: Identify and report conditions likely to impact on business viability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report conditions likely to impact on business viability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report conditions likely to impact on business viability.

pcs.text: Determine the economic threshold for the crops grown
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the economic threshold for the crops grown?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the economic threshold for the crops grown.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine IPM strategy

elements.title: Design control measures for weeds, pests or diseases

pcs.text: Determine the appropriate method to control any weed, pest or disease issue that ensures limited impact on beneficial organisms and minimises the possibility of weeds, pests or diseases developing resistance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the appropriate method to control any weed, pest or disease issue that ensures limited impact on beneficial organisms and minimises the possibility of weeds, pests or diseases developing resistance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the appropriate method to control any weed, pest or disease issue that ensures limited impact on beneficial organisms and minimises the possibility of weeds, pests or diseases developing resistance.

pcs.text: Develop strategies to ensure minimal or no risk of resistance developing in the range of weeds, pests or diseases identified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop strategies to ensure minimal or no risk of resistance developing in the range of weeds, pests or diseases identified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop strategies to ensure minimal or no risk of resistance developing in the range of weeds, pests or diseases identified.

pcs.text: Confirm control measures account for the damage threshold of the particular crop and that product still conforms to market access and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm control measures account for the damage threshold of the particular crop and that product still conforms to market access and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm control measures account for the damage threshold of the particular crop and that product still conforms to market access and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Develop a weed, pest or disease prevention program where possible to minimise, limit or remove risk factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a weed, pest or disease prevention program where possible to minimise, limit or remove risk factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a weed, pest or disease prevention program where possible to minimise, limit or remove risk factors.

pcs.text: Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for IPM strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for IPM strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for IPM strategy.

pcs.text: Document IPM program according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document IPM program according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document IPM program according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Design control measures for weeds, pests or diseases

elements.title: Monitor IPM program activities and control procedures

pcs.text: Monitor IPM program activities and identify thresholds for remedial action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor IPM program activities and identify thresholds for remedial action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor IPM program activities and identify thresholds for remedial action.

pcs.text: Undertake and document remedial action or contingency plan where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake and document remedial action or contingency plan where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake and document remedial action or contingency plan where necessary.

pcs.text: Confirm control procedures reflect sound implementation of IPM strategy and program, marketing objectives and business imperatives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm control procedures reflect sound implementation of IPM strategy and program, marketing objectives and business imperatives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm control procedures reflect sound implementation of IPM strategy and program, marketing objectives and business imperatives.

pcs.text: Monitor control procedures and undertake remedial action where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor control procedures and undertake remedial action where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor control procedures and undertake remedial action where necessary.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Monitor IPM program activities and control procedures
